faqs.answer: Our Melrose restaurant pest control includes monthly inspections, integrated pest management for rodents, cockroaches, flies, and stored product pests, plus detailed service reports for health department compliance. faqs.question: Why is the pricing $175-$600 per month?
faqs.answer: Restaurant pest control pricing varies based on your establishment's square footage, number of treatment areas, infestation severity, and service frequency. Smaller cafes or takeout spots typically start at $175/month, while full-service restaurants with larger kitchens and multiple dining areas range up to $600/month. We provide free inspections and customized quotes for all Melrose restaurants.
